title: Splashmat/Table covering | 1.5m x 1.5m | Great for messy activities | Strong waterproof plastic | Easy to clean!
features: SPLASHMAT | Table cover for messy play activities in blue with arts and crafts motif.
EASY CLEAN | Made from strong plastic, these mats are easy to clean with warm soapy water. The mats are also waterproof, protecting the table underneath.
MESSY PLAY | Ideal for a wide range of messy play activities, such as crafting parties, birthday parties, and for protecting any furniture during messy play activities.
NURSERIES & PLAY GROUPS | These splashmats are ideal for arts and crafts projects, collages or for decorations. This splashmat is suitable for craft groups, schools, nurseries, & play groups.
LARGE SIZE | Each mat measures 1.5 metre x 1.5 metre.
